betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Starmetal Armor§f

§aHigh-end celestial alloy armor. Fireproof and hits hard.§f

Full set: 10 defense, 1.0 RR, hard damage cap of 15, 0.5 damage modifier.
Upgrades FROM Cobalt Armor pieces. Fireproof immunity (lava, fire, afterburn).

§bBismuth Armor§f: Notable side-grade. Jump Boost, Speed, Regen II, Night Vision, fall damage nullification, 3 dashes. Requires Rare Earth + Bismuth Compound + Gold Wire.

§eTip§f: Starmetal's fire immunity alone makes it worth rushing. Bismuth is excellent for exploration but doesn't upgrade further.
